content: Phase 1: Build spec-faithful Python engine package
Phase 1: Run POC end-to-end on real ES CSV — validated (data, features, no-leakage, backtest, optimizer all pass)
Phase 1: Fix until POC passes — done (engine mechanically correct, tractable runtime)
Phase 2: Get design guidelines (dark terminal aesthetic) from design_agent
Phase 2: Build FastAPI backend wrapping engine (instruments, single backtest, optimize, results, downloads)
Phase 2: Build React dark terminal dashboard (run panel, metrics scorecard, charts, trade log)
